checkpoint.summary: unit_014 complete. Added parallel phase-review dispatch guidance to both invoke docs. commands/invoke.md Step 10 gains a 'Parallel dispatch with commit-agent-changes' sub-section at the top: when both code-review and commit-agent-changes skills are installed, dispatch them in a single assistant message containing two Agent(subagent_type='general-purpose') tool calls -- one reads the branch diff to produce a review, the other commits + pushes + opens-or-updates the PR. They cannot conflict (read vs. disjoint write). Step 12 (Commit) gained a call-out pointer to skip the separate delegation when phase-completion already fan-out the work. Workspace-commands template section 13 carries the same rule as a 'Parallel dispatch.' bold-label paragraph; section 12 got the same pointer. Single-skill-installed falls back to serial. 109/109 tests unchanged.
checkpoint.next_action: Complete unit_015 (PHASE_003): Update skills/development-harness/templates/claude-code/rules/harness-core.md and the Cursor mirror templates/rules/harness-core.mdc with delegate-vs-inline guidance (when to use the Explore agent, when to fan out general-purpose agents, when to run inline in the main context).
